title: First Recordings 1973
notes:
Recorded between 1973 and 1974.
Mastered at Foothill Digital, NYC.

A project of Hips Road
ⒸⓅ1995 Tzadik

Packaging: clear tray jewel case

A second pressing has new typography throughout by Heung Heung Chin (Chippy). The main changes are the title on the cover and the replacement of coloured text on pink inside, with black text on gold. Date on back seems to be the same.
